reasoning: SPY 740.39 sits at premarket low + 0.98 cents after a gap-down 7.69 from 748.08 prior close. The BEAR ribbon (fast 740.67 > pivot 741.27 > slow 743.36 inverted, spread 269¢) confirms structural weakness. Price is testing the 739.41 PML (premarket low) support from above. The battle level is 739.41 — if it holds, a relief bounce targets 743.56 (prior RTH low) then the 745-749 zone. If it breaks below, the next support shelf is the 735-736 reference range before the 731.83 carry support (5-day low). VIX rising (+7.84%) reinforces bearish pressure. Confidence moderate due to cluster of reference levels within $3, but no high-conviction Carry-tier support in immediate play zone except the PML.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 739.41 on first test (support confirmed)

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below 739.41 (support broken, flush continues)

tertiary.condition: if SPY breaks above 741.0 (resistance reclaim, gap-fill attempt)

key_observations: Gap-down overnight (−7.69) with premarket high 748.17 briefly tested then rejected — typical gap-down morning probe pattern.
BEAR ribbon stack inverted with 269¢ spread; fast EMA 740.67 is first overhead resistance above current 740.39 — a move above it weakens the bearish structure.
Price at exact premarket low + 1¢ — initial flush complete, decision point forming. If support at 739.41 holds, relief target 743-744. If broken, cascade to 735-736 then 731.83 carry support.
VIX rising (+7.84%, MID regime) reinforces structural weakness but not yet panic — room for further downside before capitulation.
5-day Carry levels (731.83 support, 749.53 resistance) are out of immediate $3 range — today's battle is local (PML/PMH zone) not multi-session.
